name: Evoke EVK510 Power Loomed Area Rug Light Blue / Beige 5'-1" X 7'-6" - Safavieh.
description: Transform your space with our exquisite, power-loomed area rug, a splendid addition to any room size 5'-1" x 7'-6". This piece masterfully combines the timeless allure of classic rug patterns with a modern color palette, showcasing a vibrant blend of light blue and beige hues that will breathe new life into your d?cor.Skillfully crafted in Turkey, this rug features a harmonious mix of 62% Polypropylene, 30% Jute, 5% Polyester, and 3% Cotton, providing a perfect balance of durability and soft touch. The medium rectangle shape and modest pile height of 3/8" make it a versatile choice suitable for a variety of home settings.The power-loomed construction ensures precision and consistency in every fiber, resulting in a rug that not only looks luxurious but can also withstand the test of daily life. This rug is free from harmful substances, making it a safe choice for your family and pets.Drawing inspiration from the image, the rug features an intricate pattern reminiscent of age-old designs that evoke an air of sophistication and charm. Whether placed in your living room, dining area, or bedroom, this rug is sure to be the centerpiece that ties your interior design together. Embrace the beauty of our power-loomed treasure and create a welcoming atmosphere in your home today. Care Instructions: Vacuum Without Beater Bar
